title: aegilops pontica
intro: Aegilops pontica, also known as Pontic goatgrass, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. Its seeds have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Aegilops pontica is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also consumed as a food supplement in some parts of the world.
